chapters.title: The Bell and the Token
chapters.llmPrompt: Create a cinematic fantasy digital painting, atmospheric dawn wide shot. Viewer-protagonist kneeling on wet moss in an ancient fog-heavy forest, holding a warm copper token engraved with a crescent moon. Show two clearly diverging routes: a narrow deer trail toward pale river light and a vine-choked stone archway half-buried in ruined masonry. Add drifting mist layers, dew on ferns, distant bell silhouette, and subtle tension in the lighting. Mood: mysterious adventure with quiet dread, no ending spoilers, no text, no watermark.

chapters.title: The River Crossing
chapters.llmPrompt: Create a cinematic fantasy digital painting, atmospheric riverbank dawn composition. A black-glass river with mirror-still water reflects the pale morning sky without a single ripple—no wind, no birdsong, utter unnatural stillness. To the right, a rope-bound ancient root bridge curves toward amber lanterns of Emberfen village through thinning mist. To the left, a river-grey ferryman stands motionless in a moored flat-bottomed boat, notched bone oar along the hull, eyes already fixed on a copper crescent token in the protagonist's fist with unmistakable recognition. Mood: a decision felt before it is named, quiet recognition across dark water, two paths offering themselves in very different languages, no ending spoilers, no text, no watermark.

chapters.title: The Moon Arch
chapters.llmPrompt: Create a cinematic fantasy digital painting, roofless ruin interior composition. A moss-eaten stone chamber where vines reclaim flagstones and pale green canopy light falls through the open ceiling. Ancient script cuts deep into the lintel above a half-buried archway. At the far wall, a stone pedestal draped in pale vine holds a crescent-shaped hollow in its surface, a breath of warmth rising toward an outstretched hand. On the flagstones below the pedestal, a bone-handled knife lies wedged between heaved paving stones—recently dropped, blade still dark. Mood: ancient covenant made physical, an unexpected clue measured in hours, cold enchantment and quiet dread, no ending spoilers, no text, no watermark.

Shuttered windows line the walls; outside, no dogs bark, no children stir. The protagonist sits across the table. Mood: a community fracturing along human fault lines, the weight of being the last reasonable option, no ending spoilers, no text, no watermark.

chapters.title: Probe Debrief
chapters.llmPrompt: Create an epic hard-sci-fi concept art image, recovered probe analysis scene. chapters.llmPrompt: Create an epic hard-sci-fi concept art image, post-transit derelict system wide composition. Mood: a permanent door closing in the name of safety, the weight of irreversibility carried in silence rather than argument, a countdown that is already a past tense, no ending spoilers, no text, no watermark.

chapters.title: Pawprint Garden

chapters.title: The Shadow Owl
chapters.llmPrompt: Same style. Nursery light glows weakly behind them as ash-dark wings swallow the roofline and dawn stays cold. Mood: doomed courage, no text, no watermark.

chapters.title: The Rooftop Gambit

Above him, a gigantic owl silhouette begins its descent, soot-black feathers eclipsing the moon and throwing the tiles into shadow. Mood: fearless brinkmanship, no text, no watermark.

chapters.title: The Briefing Before Descent
chapters.llmPrompt: Create an epic high-fantasy concept art image, cinematic wide shot. Viewer-protagonist descending a massive chain-and-stone stair into the Underforge, holding a sealed diplomatic writ with wax sigil. Show colliding architectural styles in one colossal cavern: angular dwarven ironworks fused with arcane wizard buttresses and rune-lit bridges. Add molten light plumes, drifting forge sparks, distant guard silhouettes, and subtle signs of unrest (barricades, scorched banners, watchfires). Mood: heroic duty under pressure, looming civil conflict, no ending spoilers, no text, no watermark.

chapters.title: Oathhall Alliance
chapters.llmPrompt: Create an epic high-fantasy concept art image, alliance negotiation in a battle-scarred hall. The Oathhall: ancient stone hall with clan banners scorched black at the edges from recent sabotage, thin forge-smoke still reading in cold rafters. Clan-Mother Brynja stands at a long stone table reading the joint writ without expression—shorter than expected, broader, with the undemonstrative authority of someone managing a crisis on reserves of protocol three days old. Two clan-guards flank her. Through the back passage, failing pylon light flickers in the tunnel beyond. Mood: institutional trust tested to depletion, an alliance offered because no other option holds, the pragmatic calm of emergency command, no ending spoilers, no text, no watermark.

chapters.title: Wizard Tunnels
chapters.llmPrompt: Create an epic high-fantasy concept art image, abandoned wizard tunnel infiltration. Narrow low passages under the Underforge, walls chalky with failing ancient wards—old spellwork drying and flaking at the seams. Fresh cipher scratch-marks at junction points glow faintly in torch-shadow. One intact floor-seal flares white under a boot, its resonance tone rolling through stone in all directions as an alarm already past recall. In the foreground, a young dwarven scout is wedged behind a collapsed arch with a twisted ankle, watching the protagonist crouch beside her with the rapid assessment of someone weighing options under time pressure. Mood: covert approach blown at the worst moment, intelligence exchanged between people who now share a deadline, the wrong kind of attention converging below, no ending spoilers, no text, no watermark.

chapters.title: Ash Ledger
chapters.llmPrompt: Create an epic high-fantasy concept art image, archive sabotage evidence discovery scene. A lower Underforge chamber ankle-deep in ash and half-burned documents—evidence destruction that did not quite finish its work. By torchlight, the protagonist kneels over fragile scorched pages, piecing together handwriting from two sources: dwarven hardliners and wizard inner circle, both having tampered with the same pylons on a coordinated schedule designed to appear mutual. The architecture of a manufactured crisis laid out in its own destroyed paperwork. Mood: the specific clarity of understanding a false-flag operation, evidence that explains a war and endangers its finder in the same moment, no ending spoilers, no text, no watermark.

chapters.title: Pylon Chambers
chapters.llmPrompt: Create an epic high-fantasy concept art image, pylon stabilization confrontation scene. A mid-level Underforge chamber housing a column of forged iron wrapped in dwarven runework, its surface visibly oxidizing under too much heat—failing in real time. Brynja's lead engineer works steady-handed at the column base with flux tools, voice clipped to precision. A wizard envoy in deep robes stands at the chamber entrance, volatile spellfire cradled in an open hand—orange accelerant energy offered as the faster solution. The engineer's posture refuses it with technical conviction. Molten iron weeps from a ceiling joint. Mood: two expert solutions colliding in a failing chamber, good-faith disagreement between people who both know their craft, the wyrm's call resonating through the stone from below, no ending spoilers, no text, no watermark.

chapters.title: The Crown Vault
chapters.llmPrompt: Create an epic high-fantasy concept art image, crown vault convergence composition. A vault with a fifty-foot ceiling above a slow-moving lake of living iron, its bright surface reflecting the Crown of the Underforge suspended between three oath pillars by dwarven alloy chains engraved with covenant clauses. Every faction has arrived in the same moment: Clan-Mother Brynja at the entrance with clan guard; wizard envoys filling the upper gallery, robes shifting in rising heated air. Through the stone floor, the mountain trembles. Mood: every competing claim arriving at the same threshold simultaneously, the architecture of power that was never designed for a single hand, the next decision carrying the weight of the entire structure, no ending spoilers, no text, no watermark.

chapters.title: Stone Silence

chapters.title: Proof by Fire

chapters.title: The Artifact Room

A tired woman analyst studies a main display where a waveform locks onto an incoming vector, while a tired dark-haired man in a worn jumpsuit stands at the open hatch with one hand on the frame. Iridescent reflections skate across the sealed chamber. Mood: revelation before choice, no text, no watermark.

In the foreground, a tired dark-haired man in a pressure suit faces the window with one gloved hand lifted near the glass while the station behind him falls silent. chapters.title: Controlled Burn

Outside the hatch, in a separate corridor space, a tired dark-haired man braces one palm against the closed reinforced door, seeing her only through the small viewport window. chapters.title: The Last Loop
chapters.llmPrompt: Same style. Final emergency-pod bay shot from behind a tired dark-haired man in a worn jumpsuit facing a sealed launch hatch. Red indicators burn across dead berths while a sheared viewport exposes motionless stars and drifting debris; the corridor lights fail in bands along warped metal ribs. No explosion, only the station coming apart around him. Mood: terminal isolation, no text, no watermark.

chapters.title: Severance

A tired dark-haired man sits on the floor writing page after page on a clipboard while a tired woman analyst leans beside him, reading over his shoulder. Through a side viewport, the alien cluster separates and drifts back into the belt. Mood: exhausted new beginning, no text, no watermark.
